input_text:
I've been thinking about variable naming conventions and I personally prefer to use 'should' as a prefix for boolean variables rather than 'is' — shouldShowModal feels more imperative than isModalVisible to me.

Changed a few files in my local branch to use this convention. Haven't discussed with the team yet, just experimenting with the style.
reviewer_notes: Personal preference / experimentation in a local branch. Author has not discussed with the team, so it is not a team convention or policy.
